name: PDF Document RAG from Google Drive
description: Searches Google Drive for documents matching a user question, exports their content as plain text, uses Claude AI to synthesize an accurate answer grounded in the document content with citations, and posts the answer to Slack with Block Kit formatting. Adapted from n8n's PDF RAG system with Mistral OCR workflow.

source.originalName: Build a PDF Document RAG System with Mistral OCR, Qdrant and Gemini AI

googleDriveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for searching and reading documents

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the answer

question.description: The question to answer from Google Drive documents

folderId.description: Google Drive folder ID to search within (optional — searches all files if omitted)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Build Google Drive search query from the question
Search Google Drive for relevant documents
Select top files to fetch content from
Export each document as plain text
Compile all document content for AI analysis
Build Claude prompt for document Q&A
Build Slack Block Kit document answer
